recipe.title: Allotment cottage pie
recipe.description: Extraordinarily delicious, this corker of a recipe is super nutritious and comforting – and guaranteed to put a smile on anyone’s face.

steps.descr: In a blender, cover the porcini with 600ml of boiling water
steps.instructions: In a blender, cover the porcini with 600ml of boiling water.

on_enter.say: In a blender, cover the porcini with 600ml of boiling water.

steps.descr: Trim, wash and slice the leeks 2cm thick, then scrub the...
steps.instructions: Trim, wash and slice the leeks 2cm thick, then scrub the carrots, swede and celeriac and chop to roughly the same size.

on_enter.say: Trim, wash and slice the leeks 2cm thick, then scrub the carrots, swede and celeriac and chop to roughly the same size.

steps.descr: Drizzle 2 tablespoons of oil into a large casserole pan...
steps.instructions: Drizzle 2 tablespoons of oil into a large casserole pan on a medium heat, strip in the rosemary, fry for 1 minute to crisp up, then remove to a plate with a slotted spoon.

on_enter.say: Drizzle 2 tablespoons of oil into a large casserole pan on a medium heat, strip in the rosemary, fry for 1 minute to crisp up, then remove to a plate with a slotted spoon.

steps.descr: Add the cumin seeds and prepped veg to the flavoured...
steps.instructions: Add the cumin seeds and prepped veg to the flavoured oil, season with sea salt and black pepper, and cook for 30 minutes, stirring regularly.

on_enter.say: Add the cumin seeds and prepped veg to the flavoured oil, season with sea salt and black pepper, and cook for 30 minutes, stirring regularly.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, peel and roughly chop the potatoes, cook in a...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, peel and roughly chop the potatoes, cook in a pan of boiling salted water for 15 minutes, or until tender, then drain well. Mash with the butter and milk, and season to taste.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, peel and roughly chop the potatoes, cook in a pan of boiling salted water for 15 minutes, or until tender, then drain well. Mash with the butter and milk, and season to taste.

steps.descr: Quarter the onion, add to the porcini in the blender...
steps.instructions: Quarter the onion, add to the porcini in the blender along with the Marmite and tomato purée and whiz until smooth.

on_enter.say: Quarter the onion, add to the porcini in the blender along with the Marmite and tomato purée and whiz until smooth.

steps.descr: Pour into the veg pan and cook for 20 minutes, or until...
steps.instructions: Pour into the veg pan and cook for 20 minutes, or until dark and caramelised, stirring regularly and scraping up any sticky bits from the bottom of the pan.

on_enter.say: Pour into the veg pan and cook for 20 minutes, or until dark and caramelised, stirring regularly and scraping up any sticky bits from the bottom of the pan.

steps.descr: Tip the lentils (juices and all) into the veg pan, bring...
steps.instructions: Tip the lentils (juices and all) into the veg pan, bring to the boil, then season to taste.

on_enter.say: Tip the lentils (juices and all) into the veg pan, bring to the boil, then season to taste.

steps.descr: Spoon over the mash, place on a tray, bake for 30...
steps.instructions: Spoon over the mash, place on a tray, bake for 30 minutes, or until lightly golden and bubbling at the edges, then sprinkle over the crispy rosemary. Serve with simple steamed seasonal greens – it’s a winner!

on_enter.say: Spoon over the mash, place on a tray, bake for 30 minutes, or until lightly golden and bubbling at the edges, then sprinkle over the crispy rosemary. Serve with simple steamed seasonal greens – it’s a winner!
